proven: Auth and permissions protect inbox actions
Conversation state changes persist in Supabase stage
Outbound reply stores an agent message
Lead conversion links lead, conversation, and patient idempotently
Inbox UI buttons execute assign, bot handoff/resume, transfer, mocked reply, lead conversion, and close while database state is verified after each action
Inbox page renders the seeded conversation on desktop and mobile
WhatsApp provider status callbacks reconcile outbound inbox message metadata by channel_message_id
nextTest: Keep one optional real-provider smoke outside the default stage run and expand inbox UI assertions only when new actions are added.

proven: Public booking creates records and reserves availability
Stage mock records email/SMS/WhatsApp intent without external calls
Stage mock records staff push intent for a public booking in push_notifications with an actionable booking URL
Reminder cron mutates scheduled reminders and notification records
Forced provider failures keep the booking pending, mark email as unsent, and log failed SMS/WhatsApp notification rows
Twilio/360dialog provider contracts validate outbound payloads, auth headers, status callback parsing, and provider error handling without live calls
notProven: Email/SMS app-level bounce/delivery webhook routes and retry scheduling
nextTest: Add app-level delivery callback/status reconciliation routes and optional real-provider smoke gated by explicit env flags.

proven: Lara opens from the UI
Mocked query produces a deterministic action suggestion
Confirmed action persists a database change
Viewer permissions block mutable AI actions
Mocked STT/TTS contracts and browser audio playback are exercised
Forced LLM/STT/TTS provider failures return deterministic retryable errors instead of silent UI or timeout behavior
notProven: Exact live-provider latency, rate-limit, malformed-response, and cost behavior
Stage/prod action_logs audit table is applied and Lara action audit rows persist
nextTest: Apply the action_logs migration to stage, make the schema gate green, then assert that confirmed Lara actions create audit rows before treating Lara persistence as complete.

proven: Subscribe and unsubscribe APIs require an authenticated active clinic context
Stage API creates, updates, and deactivates push_subscriptions rows with real clinic/user scope
Push click tracking updates push_notifications status to clicked and persists clicked_at
Settings UI handles granted-without-subscription, denied/default, and existing subscription browser states with mocked PushManager
The stage VAPID public key is decoded into a non-empty applicationServerKey during mocked browser subscription
Stage schema exposes push_subscriptions and push_notifications
Server-side Web Push sender builds VAPID/payload contracts and persists delivery status as sent or failed
Cron reminders, treatment creation, inventory low-stock alerts, and public bookings are wired to the push sender in stage-mocked product-event tests
Expired provider responses 404/410 mark delivery failed and deactivate the push subscription
Missing VAPID config fails deterministically without calling the provider
notProven: Real service worker push event emitted by a provider
Retry/backoff scheduling for transient push provider errors
nextTest: Add one optional real-browser/provider smoke gated by explicit env flags, then decide whether push needs retry/backoff or only stale-subscription cleanup.

proven: Unsigned provider requests are rejected in the production preview runtime
A Twilio-signed form request is accepted without the QA signature bypass, while outbound delivery remains stage-mocked
Inbound Twilio form fixtures create lead, conversation, and inbound message rows
Name and email collection advances collecting_name -> collecting_email -> chatting
Human handoff keywords move bot conversations to pending
Click-to-WhatsApp Referral* fields persist to lead attribution and message metadata
Repeated provider MessageSid requests are idempotent and do not duplicate messages
360dialog Cloud API JSON text payloads create lead, conversation, inbound message, and CTWA attribution rows
360dialog/Twilio status callbacks reconcile provider delivery state into whatsapp_notifications and inbox_messages
notProven: A valid signed request generated by Twilio's live edge infrastructure
A live 360dialog webhook request using production Basic Auth configuration
Real outbound provider delivery from webhook replies
AI fallback quality when the conversation reaches chatting
Provider retry timing under real network conditions
nextTest: Add optional real Twilio and 360dialog provider smokes gated by explicit env flags.

proven: Critical pages render without fatal errors
Selected baselines compare screenshots with tolerance
Desktop and mobile no-horizontal-overflow checks exist
notProven: Every language and theme combination has visual baselines
nextTest: Add targeted baselines only after each module has stable product behavior and selectors.
